transcript: Music My favorite part of what I do is helping out the officers. Music We enter missing people into the database. We also enter stolen cars or impounded cars. We enter warrants. We also enter protection orders and we also help officers in assisting them with information that they may not be able to have at their fingertips out in the field. We also help the public as far as anytime they need a police report we fulfill that request for them. It is us that processes that and gets that back to them. It's kind of like a puzzle and you know you get kind of your investigative cap on and you try to go through different avenues trying to assist them with whatever information they are seeking. The great thing about our team that we have right now is we all started brand new with our records department so we built up a really good rapport with one another. It is literally like a family. We all are really good friends. We help each other out. I like working for the City of Vancouver because I believe that they are very close-knit. Everyone that I've encountered has been very pleasant, very helpful. Any problem I may encounter or question that I may have, they always get the answer and they're always just on top of it and they're just very helpful.
